title: Echoes of Kaepora
description: ✨ Magic 🔮 Mysticism 🗡️ RPG Progression 🎯 Skills 📜 Classes 🛡️ Professions ⚔️ Combat 🧿 Relics 🏆 Legendary Items ⁉️ Questing 🗺️ Exploration 🌍 New Dimensions 🏰 Structures 🌱 Farming & Cooking 🎒 Backpacks 🧭 Waystones 🛠️ Quality of Life 🎧 Immersive
body:
Echoes of Kaepora NeoForge 1.21.1 Modpack

Key Features:

🌿 Exploration & World-Building

- Biomes O’ Plenty & YUNG’s Better Structures for lush, varied landscapes.
- Dozens of revamped dungeons, temples, strongholds, and monuments.
- New dimensions like Eternal Starlight and Infinity Cave.
- Farmer’s Delight & add-ons expand farming, cooking, and vegan-friendly food.
- Waystones & backpacks for smoother long-distance adventuring.

✨ Magic & Mysticism

- Master multiple schools of magic: Ars Nouveau, Occultism, Primal Magick, Malum, Theurgy, Iron’s Spellbooks, and more.
- Craft spells, summon familiars, perform rituals, and harness mystical forces.
- Choose diverse magical paths with unique progression systems and abilities.
- Collect and wield relics, artifacts, and legendary items.

🗡️ RPG Progression, Combat & Quests

- Better Combat for fluid melee animations, dual wielding, and smoother battles.
- Skill trees, attributes, classes, and professions that grow as you play.
- Face epic challenges like Mowzie’s Mobs and oceanic foes from Mermod.
- Expand your arsenal with Too Many Bows, enchanted weapons, and artifacts.
- Questing systems with better advancements to guide your journey.

🎧 Immersive & Optimized Gameplay

- Dynamic soundscapes with Ambient Sounds & Sound Physics Remastered.
- UI & HUD upgrades for smoother gameplay (BetterF3, Controlling, Jade, Stylish Effects).
- Visual polish with connected textures, lighting tweaks, and Sodium optimizations.
- Performance-friendly design — dozens of QoL features like right-click harvesting, pickup notifications, smooth zoom, and more.
